title: Eva 111 and 222 DVD BD Extras Discussion
display_title: Eva 111 and 222 DVD BD Extras Discussion
wikitext:
[]: Eva 1.11 and 2.22 DVD/BD Extras Discussion             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Mar 22, 2011 2:45 pm Mod note : Mainly a thread for what extras Funimation did and didn't include in their Eva DVD/BD releases. Discussion of what extras other releases had (original Japanese release, other countries, etc) can go in here too.~ SSD Sailor Star Dust wrote: Also, sorry if this was answered already and I missed it, but for anybody who happens to have the 2.22 DVD already: do the extras seem identical to the 2.22 BD release or it's hard to say?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Mar 22, 2011 3:08 pm What the 1.11 DVD (disc 2) included is: ~Rebuild of Evangelion 1.01 (Making of Feature; the Sagisu and Ravel versions are backwards). ~Angel of Doom Promo Video ~News flash (Well, mostly. See below.) ~Beautiful World trailer (Versions 2/2A/2B) ~Trailers for Funimation's other releases. What was missing (but I'm assuming on 1.11 BD?): ~The version of the News Flash which features the "New Character, New Machine, New Story" text! ~Fly Me to the Moon trailer(s) ~The rest of the Beautiful World trailer(s) ~Eva 2.0 trailer(s) ~The TV spots for 1.01 and 1.11: one of them featured footage of Rei; another had an example of brightness differences between 1.01 and 1.11. I'm bringing this up in here because I really hope 2.22 DVD versus BD doesn't have this problem. Not everybody can shell out money for both versions AND there's no excuse to not have the same extras the Japanese release did! Though, the Scripts have never been included in Eva U.S. releases AFAIK.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Mar 22, 2011 3:50 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: What was missing (but I'm assuming on 1.11 BD?): ~The version of the News Flash which features the "New Character, New Machine, New Story" text! ~Fly Me to the Moon trailer(s) ~The rest of the Beautiful World trailer(s) ~Eva 2.0 trailer(s) ~The TV spots for 1.01 and 1.11: one of them featured footage of Rei; another had an example of brightness differences between 1.01 and 1.11. I'm bringing this up in here because I really hope 2.22 DVD versus BD doesn't have this problem. Not everybody can shell out money for both versions AND there's no excuse to not have the same extras the Japanese release did! Though, the Scripts have never been included in Eva U.S. releases AFAIK.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Mar 22, 2011 3:54 pm Really? Lame !

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Tue Mar 22, 2011 7:56 pm Funny, on my DVD I have the Fly Me to the Moon trailer and the 2.0 preview. Are you sure we got the same dub release?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Mar 22, 2011 8:11 pm It should be a 2-disc DVD (and there's no arrow button for access to anything else that I've seen) with the CG-Khara pic of Eva-01 firing a gun. Also: 2.0 Next Time Preview at the end of the film is NOT the same thing as the first Trailer for 2.0, just to clarify. Here, a screencap: I'll probably screencap my 2.22 DVD extras disc when I get it as well to compare/contrast.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Mar 22, 2011 10:01 pm Um... This is my disc 2 for the 2-disc 1.11 DVD: Fly Me to The Moon Versions 1, 1A, and 1B is just the song stapled to the 1.0 theatrical trailer. "Preview 1 Color-Corrected Version" was the Fly Me to The Moon version of the 2.0 theatrical trailer. Something's amiss here.... EDIT: Yes, my copy is the Funimation release.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Mar 23, 2011 4:25 pm To keep things tidy, discussion of Funimation's missing extras specifically for 1.11 (BOTH the Blu-Ray and DVD had changes after the first-printing! ) are here . If people want to post and discuss their screencaps of the 2.22 DVD/BD releases (and by the time Third Impact hits, other New Movie Edition releases ), feel free to do that in here.

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Thu Mar 24, 2011 5:38 pm The extras on 1.11 didn't impress me that much anyway. A lot of still art, trailers, and TV spots, but no commentary, interviews, deleted scenes, etc.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Mar 24, 2011 7:06 pm I have the 1.11 BD and it contained all the stuff that was in the 1.11 DVD. Maybe I got an updated copy. Was their a problem with the original 1.11 BD?

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Thu Mar 24, 2011 7:09 pm You have it backwards, TheFriskyIan . The 1st pressing of the DVD and BD had all of the extras, the latter ones had some of the trailers removed.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Mar 24, 2011 7:19 pm svenge wrote: You have it backwards, TheFriskyIan . The 1st pressing of the DVD and BD had all of the extras, the latter ones had some of the trailers removed.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Thu Mar 24, 2011 10:01 pm ^Same here, dude!

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Mar 31, 2011 2:31 pm here are the screen caps of the extras on 2.22 DVD, it's a little different from 1.11 because some of the extras are on disc one. Disc 1 extras - in case you can't read that it says Eva cast commentary disc 2 extras

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 31, 2011 2:33 pm Thanks for the screencaps! :) Looks like good stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Mar 31, 2011 2:48 pm Watch SSD 's 2.22 extras be different... and smaller in number.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Thu Mar 31, 2011 3:21 pm Too bad the "I would give you anything" scene wasnt dubbed.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Thu Mar 31, 2011 3:48 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Watch SSD 's 2.22 extras be different... and smaller in number.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Apr 01, 2011 9:01 am No 2.22 Fly Me To the Moon or 2.22 Beautiful World trailers considering those were on the First Printing of Funimation's 1.11 DVD/BD. Sad face. (At least we get The Final Decision We All Must Take trailer.) Will be posting menu screencaps shortly in that other thread. Kaji: "Ikari Shinji-kun?" Shinji: "Hai?" Kaji: "Aishiteru yo." EDIT: Regarding the Eva 2.22 Booklet...anybody else have the amusing typo where the TV series is referred to as "Evangelion New Theatrical Edition (1995) instead of what SHOULD say "Neon Genesis Evangelion"? Also: the back-to-back pages of Evangelion units and the Angels... While the Angel numbering, a photo, and a brief description of each Angel is listed, the page of the Eva units only has their names/numbering and a photo. There's no description of EACH Eva (general Evangelion description similar for the Angels, but that's all). I'm curious if this was the case for anybody else? The booklet does have rather interesting information in it, I suggest y'all take a read-through.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Fri Apr 01, 2011 10:57 am Anyone check out 2.02 yet? The music is just AWESOME!!!
